creator: loos@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't like the idea of pollute the sysctls with a setting for everything gpio pin in the system.  Especially when usually only a single gpio pin is used to identify the shutdown.

What about a new gpio 'device' (something like gpioshutdown) that can be built in the kernel or as a module ?

One could build/configure the shutdown pin state of any number of gpio pins this way.
